productDisplayName: Proline Men  Navy Blue Track Pants
description: CompositionFull length navy blue track pants made of 100% polyester, has a navy blue and grey, broad elasticated waistband with drawstrings, insert side pockets with white piping, grey piping from the waist to the hem along the sides, adjustable toggle straps at the hems and brand logo printed below the left pocketFitRegularWash careDry clean preferredWash inside out with like colours using mild detergentDo not bleachDrip dry in shadeWarm iron do not iron on decorationsLook stylish as you work out in the gym, go for a walk or jog in the park. These navy blue track pants from proline belong in your wardrobe as they'll add an instant spark to your look. The side pockets are spacious enough for everything from your wallet to iPod. The fabric is breathable, and the waist band is soft for a more snug fit you can use the internal drawstring too. Team it up with a cool t-shirt, an excellent pair of shoes, and you'll be ready to hit the road.Model statisticsThe product is a size M, length 44 inches on a model of height 6' and waist 32& rdquo
